{{CargoRelic
|name=Prodigy Chef's Cookbook
|class_id=20536
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=As a journal from the prodigy chef's culinary training journey across various regions, this notebook documents the preparation methods of many local dishes. Novices can find entry-level guidance from its content, while experienced chefs can glean culinary insights.
|fame=14
|art=13
|fth=17
|civ=32
|tech=14
|ss1=Unicorn Express Supply Order Cap +10<br>Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail ATK +1<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss2=Unicorn Express Supply Order Cap +20<br>Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail ATK +2<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss3=Unicorn Express Supply Order Cap +30<br>Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail ATK +3<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss4=Unicorn Express Supply Order Cap +30<br>Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail ATK +3<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300
|ss7=Unicorn Express Supply Order Cap +30<br>Per 5 new Dishes created, Snail ATK +3<br>New Dishes Created: 300/300<br> (Awakened)
}}
